deliverFormat: Provide: (1) Test Plan Overview, (2) Test Matrix/Checklist, (3) Detailed Test Cases, (4) Gaps & TODOs, (5) Fixtures & Data Setup, (6) Mocks/Stubs, (7) Automation Notes, (8) Regression Suite Updates.
additionalInstructions: Keep suggestions specific, actionable, and safe to implement incrementally. Use concise steps and clear expected results. Avoid speculation.
